product_description: A project management SaaS platform for software development teams that integrates task tracking, code review workflows, and team collaboration in a single workspace.
target_market: Software development teams at mid-size technology companies (50–500 employees)

features.name: Task creation and assignment
features.description: Create tasks, set due dates, assign them to team members, and track their status through a Kanban board or list view.

features.name: GitHub/GitLab integration
features.description: Automatically link pull requests and commits to tasks, updating task status when a PR is merged or a branch is created.

features.name: AI-powered task decomposition
features.description: Use AI to break down a high-level feature description into concrete sub-tasks with effort estimates and suggested assignees based on past work patterns.

features.name: Real-time collaborative editing
features.description: Multiple team members can simultaneously edit task descriptions, comments, and acceptance criteria with live cursors, similar to Google Docs.

features.name: Sprint planning and velocity tracking
features.description: Plan two-week sprints, assign story points, and track team velocity over time with burndown charts and sprint retrospective templates.

features.name: Email and Slack notifications
features.description: Send configurable notifications when tasks are assigned, updated, or overdue via email and Slack integration.

features.name: Custom workflow automation
features.description: Define no-code automation rules such as 'when a PR is merged, move the linked task to Done and notify the reporter'.

features.name: Dark mode
features.description: Toggle between light and dark visual themes across the entire application interface.

features.name: Mandatory two-factor authentication
features.description: Enforce two-factor authentication for all team members as a security requirement that cannot be disabled by individual users.

features.name: Gamification and achievement badges
features.description: Award badges and points to team members for completing tasks, closing bugs, or writing documentation, with a leaderboard visible to the whole team.
